regimeNotes: Constructive-but-cautious. Fed on hold at 4.25-4.50% with cuts toward 3.0-3.25% expected by year-end (tailwind for duration and equities; S&P target ~7,400). Crypto in an Extreme-Fear drawdown (F&G 18, BTC dominance 56.6%, total cap ~$2.28T). Posture: defensive barbell (gold + long bonds + 23% cash) alongside quality equity and a BTC-led crypto sleeve accumulated into the fear. Dry powder reserved to add on further weakness.

SPY.thesis: Core US beta into an easing cycle.
SPY.invalidation: Sustained break below ~$660 or a hawkish Fed re-pricing.

MSFT.invalidation: Cloud growth deceleration or AI capex with no ROI; < ~$340.

GOOGL.thesis: Quality cash machine at fair value with AI optionality.
GOOGL.invalidation: Search share erosion to AI rivals; < ~$310.

TLT.thesis: Long duration to harvest rate cuts; ballast.

GLD.invalidation: Real yields spike with strong USD; < ~$350.

BTC.thesis: Accumulate the strongest crypto into Extreme Fear.
